message:
feat(agent): add compaction settings plumbing + fix thinking budget overflow

Wire configurable compaction settings through the agent session and fix
two model parameter issues:

Compaction settings (src/agent.rs, src/main.rs):
- Add ResolvedCompactionSettings field to AgentSession, populated from
  Config at startup (enabled, reserve_tokens, keep_recent_tokens)
- Thread compaction_settings through AgentSession::new() constructor
- Update all 9 test call sites to pass ResolvedCompactionSettings::default()

Thinking budget fix (src/model.rs):
- Change ThinkingLevel::XHigh budget from u32::MAX to 32768 — u32::MAX
  caused API errors when serialized as the budget_tokens field because
  it exceeds model context limits; 32768 is a high but reasonable cap

Anthropic provider fix (src/providers/anthropic.rs):
- Ensure max_tokens > thinking.budget_tokens by adding 4096 headroom
  when the thinking budget would exceed or equal max_tokens — prevents
  API rejection where max_tokens must be strictly greater than
  budget_tokens for extended thinking requests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
